Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify Meetings widget displays empty state message when no meetings are scheduled
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page. No meetings are currently scheduled for this user.
Objective: To verify the Meetings widget displays the empty state message 'You have no meetings scheduled at this time' with count '0'.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the Meetings accordion heading displays 'You have no meetings scheduled at this time'
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading name="You have no meetings scheduled at this time" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Meetings accordion heading displays 'You have no meetings scheduled at this time'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the meeting count badge displays '0'
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Count badge '0' is displayed next to the Meetings heading.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Open calendar' link is visible in the Meetings widget
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Open calendar" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Open calendar' link is visible in the Meetings accordion header area.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Export all' button is visible in the Meetings widget
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Export all" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Export all' button is visible in the Meetings accordion header area.
Profile dropdown opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify 'Open calendar' link in Meetings widget navigates to the calendar page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Open calendar' in the Meetings widget navigates to the calendar page at /events/calendar.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Open calendar' link in the Meetings widget
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Open calendar" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the calendar page at /events/calendar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Home' link in the left sidebar to return
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated back to the Home page at /home/index.
Profile dropdown opens.
